steps.title: What meaning does the blank need?
steps.content: The blank describes the "approach to password selection" that "favors convenience over security" — shown by "iloveyou" being the eighth most commonly used password. The blank must mean widespread or common-among-people.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The [word] needs to mean the approach that most people actually take. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — creative: imaginative, original — a creative approach would produce unique passwords, not reused ones like "iloveyou." ✗
  • Choice B — popular: widely used, adopted by many people — fits exactly: the "popular" approach favors convenience and produces predictable passwords. ✓
  • Choice C — complex: complicated — contradicts the passage, which says this approach favors convenience (not complexity) over security. ✗
  • Choice D — useful: practical for a purpose — too vague, and doesn't explain why people pick weak passwords. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
